creator: dannyman@toldme.com
text:
It is hard to figure out which port installs Net::LDAP.  Thre is no port
called p5-Net-LDAP and a ports tree search does not return p5-perl-ldap.

Fix: 

Include the string "Net::LDAP" is the one-line description of
perl-net-ldap.
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports && make search key=Net::LDAP
